summary: Iteration 10 testing complete - All new temporal dashboard and action execution features verified. Backend: 21/22 tests passed (1 skipped due to no pending approvals). Frontend: All 5 dashboard tabs verified with Timeline charts (AreaChart + LineChart), Execucoes log, Integracoes connectors, and Agentes communication display.

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) when modal first opens - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after

critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/agency/products/{id}/metrics correctly auto-records history snapshot after each update
GET /api/agency/metrics/{id}/history returns timeline data sorted by timestamp
GET /api/agency/execution-log returns execution history with action details, success status, and platform_result
POST /api/agency/approvals/{id}/approve executes actions via rules_engine.execute_action and returns execution results
Rules engine cron (rules_evaluation_loop) auto-records metrics snapshots every 5 cycles (5 minutes)
execute_on_platform function attempts real API calls to Meta/Google/TikTok when platform is connected
AgencyDashboard has 5 tabs: Visao Geral, Timeline, Execucoes, Integracoes, Agentes
Timeline tab shows AreaChart (Gasto vs Receita with gradients) and LineChart (ROAS/CPA/CTR)
Product selector dropdown in Timeline tab allows switching between products
Execucoes tab displays execution log with success/fail icons, details, and platform_result
Platform APIs (Meta/Google/TikTok) return simulated responses since no real tokens are connected - this is expected behavior
seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests (products, campaigns, rules, agent messages) - cleaned up after tests. Existing product 'Curso Marketing Digital' has metrics history with multiple snapshots.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 added: 1) Temporal dashboard with Timeline tab showing AreaChart (spend/revenue) and LineChart (ROAS/CPA/CTR), 2) Product selector dropdown in Timeline, 3) Execucoes tab showing execution log, 4) PUT /products/{id}/metrics auto-records history, 5) POST /approvals/{id}/approve executes actions and returns results, 6) Rules engine cron auto-records metrics snapshots every 5 cycles. Key test points: GET /api/agency/metrics/{prod_id}/history returns timeline data, GET /api/agency/execution-log returns execution history, POST /api/agency/approvals/{id}/approve returns {message, results}. Frontend: AgencyDashboard now has 5 tabs (Visao Geral, Timeline, Execucoes, Integracoes, Agentes). Platform APIs are MOCKED - they return simulated responses since no real tokens are connected.

backend_api.PUT /api/agency/products/{id}/metrics: PASS - Updates metrics and auto-records history snapshot
backend_api.GET /api/agency/metrics/{id}/history: PASS - Returns timeline data points with product_id, metrics, timestamp
backend_api.POST /api/agency/approvals/{id}/approve: SKIPPED - No pending approvals available (rules not triggered)
backend_api.GET /api/agency/reports/agency: PASS - Returns agency overview with all fields
backend_api.GET /api/agency/integrations: PASS - Returns list of connected platforms
backend_api.GET /api/agent-comms/{agent_id}/inbox: PASS - Returns pending messages for agent

frontend_ui.Dashboard 5 tabs: PASS - Visao Geral, Timeline, Execucoes (0), Integracoes, Agentes all present
frontend_ui.Timeline tab - AreaChart: PASS - Shows Gasto vs Receita with gradients
frontend_ui.Timeline tab - LineChart: PASS - Shows ROAS, CPA, CTR lines
frontend_ui.Execucoes tab: PASS - Shows execution log or 'Nenhuma execucao registrada'
frontend_ui.Integracoes tab: PASS - Shows Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads connectors
frontend_ui.Agentes tab: PASS - Shows 'Comunicacao entre agentes' with message list

notes.mocked_apis: Platform APIs (Meta/Google/TikTok) return simulated responses since no real tokens are connected. This is expected behavior.
notes.rules_engine: Cron runs every 60s, auto-records metrics snapshots every 5 cycles (5 minutes)
notes.approval_execution: When approval is approved, execute_action is called which logs to execution_log and attempts platform API calls
